name: SEO Toolkit
description: Enhance search visibility with Open Graph, Twitter Cards, robots meta, and structured data.
author: NodePress

settings.label: Open Graph tags
settings.description: Output og:title, og:description, og:url, and og:image on public pages.

settings.label: Open Graph site name
settings.description: Optional og:site_name override. Leave blank to use site title.

settings.label: Allow search indexing
settings.description: Emit index,follow robots meta when enabled.

settings.label: JSON-LD schema
settings.description: Emit WebSite schema when no page-specific schema exists.
